pull_up_kipping.note: Kipping pull-up UB reps not explicitly listed. Strict pull-up norms used as conservative proxy. CrossFit kipping typically 1.5-2x strict reps for same athlete.

strict_dead_hang_levels.source: ExRx pull-up norms T2 / USMC PFT MARADMIN 595/22 T1

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.comment: games=30 추정(USMC 23 + kipping bonus), elite=23(USMC max), advanced=15(ExRx upper-intermediate), intermediate=10, beginner=5

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.source: §3-2 CTB 12-15 = bar muscle-up prerequisite level → extrapolated

toes_to_bar.note: No direct T2B UB data in gymnastics.md. CrossFit gymnastics §1-3 lists T2B as category movement. No peer-reviewed UB norms found.

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.source: 추정: kipping pull-up 약 80% 수준 기준 + CrossFit competition observation

hspu_strict.source: §2-5 GymnasticBodies Foundation 1 T2 / CrossFit Diane benchmark T2

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.note: strict wall HSPU 기준. kipping HSPU는 ~2x

bar_muscle_up.strict_bar_mu_wr_female_consecutive: Maja Trochimczyk 23 strict bar MU (WSWCF 2019 T2/Reuters T1)

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.source: §3-2 prerequisites: 12-15 strict pullup = MU prereq. Games-level ~15 UB kipping BMU based on CrossFit Games event observation

ring_muscle_up.prerequisites: False grip ring row 10 + False grip pull-up 5 + Ring dip 10 + Transition negative 5x3s

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.source: §3-3 strict ring MU harder than bar MU. ~80% of bar MU volume. CrossFit Games Amanda (9-7-5) = games level

pull_up_strict.source: §2-2 USMC PFT / §9-2 Pirolo et al. T1

tier_mapping_for_grading_py.note: scaled_beginner=0: ring MU at beginner level unrealistic for women

male_1min.source: US Army ACFT army.mil T1 / 국방부 군인복지기본계획 T1 / 경찰청 채용공고 T1

push_up_per_min_thresholds.acsm_superior_note: ACSM fitness.md §3.3 Superior 기준: 남 60+ / 여 33+. gymnastics.md §2-4 와 일치. 별도 gymnastics.md push-up/min 표 없음 — fitness.md §3.3 ACSM 값이 SSOT.

grading_py_tier_mapping_male.note: 1분 max. ACFT 60=100pts 기준. CrossFit는 push-up/min 별도 기준 없어 ACFT+ACSM 보간

planche.source: §5-1 GymnasticBodies T2 / Steven Low OG 2nd T2

front_lever.source: §6-1 FBE tutorial T2 / Steven Low OG T2

back_lever.note: Back lever 진행이 front lever보다 빠름 — lat/bicep 부담 적음

one_arm_pullup.source: §8-2 Pavel Tsatsouline Naked Warrior T2 / Convict Conditioning T2

fig_difficulty.scale: A=0.1 to J=1.0 (FIG MAG Code of Points 2025-2028)
fig_difficulty.source: §1-2 §4-2 §6-3 §7-1 FIG MAG Code of Points 2025-2028 T1

pull_up_consecutive_strict.note: gymnastics.md에 명시된 pull-up WR 없음. USMC 23회 max-points 기준이 실용 최고치로 표기됨.

all_time_notable: Eleftherios Petrounias GRE (2016 Olympic gold, 3x World gold)
Yuri van Gelder NED (2005 World gold)

korean_gymnasts.yang_hak_seon: 2012 London Olympic gold Vault — handspring triple twist (Yang Hak Seon vault named)
korean_gymnasts.yeo_hong_chul: 1996 Atlanta silver Vault — Yeo I/II vault named after him

gymnastics_notable.yeo_hong_chul: 1996 Olympic silver Vault + Yeo vault naming

korean_data.pull_up_not_in_kr_military: 한국 군/경 체력검정에 pull-up 항목 없음. 팔굽혀펴기(push-up)·윗몸일으키기·달리기 3종이 표준.

tier_mapping_caveat.thruster_not_in_gymnastics_md: Thruster(바벨 프런트스쿼트+푸시프레스)는 gymnastics.md 미수록. weightlifting+conditioning 복합 동작으로 weightlifting reference에서 처리 권장. 임시: Clean 1RM 70-80% 기준 AMRAP 추정 또는 별도 설문.
tier_mapping_caveat.pistol_squat_not_in_gymnastics_md: Pistol squat도 CrossFit gymnastics 카테고리이나 이 파일에 횟수 표준 없음. r/bodyweightfitness wiki 기준 5회=중급, 10회=상급, 20+=elite 추정 필요.
tier_mapping_caveat.rope_climb_not_in_gymnastics_md: Rope climb 횟수 표준 없음. 별도 추가 필요.
tier_mapping_caveat.kipping_vs_strict_multiplier: 일반적으로 kipping UB reps ≈ strict UB reps × 1.5-2.0. grading.py 값 조정 시 이 배율 적용 권장.

tier1_key_sources: USMC PFT MARADMIN 595/22 (marines.mil) — pull-up 23 max points male, 12 female
US Army ACFT scoring scales (army.mil) — HRP 60 = 100pts
FIG MAG Code of Points 2025-2028 (gymnastics.sport) — difficulty values A-J
FITNESSGRAM Reference Guide 5th ed (Cooper Institute) — age-adjusted pull-up norms
Paris 2024 Official Olympic Results (olympics.com) — rings gold Liu Yang 15.300
Pirolo et al. Med Sci Sports Exerc 2014 — female pull-up performance
CrossFit Games Amanda (2010) — 9-7-5 muscle-up + snatch benchmark
Bishop et al. Am J Phys Anthropol 1987 — sex differences muscle cross-sectional area
tier2_key_sources: GymnasticBodies (Coach Christopher Sommer) — planche/FL/ring MU progressions
Steven Low Overcoming Gravity 2nd ed — OAP/OAC/injury chapter
WSWCF records — Maja Trochimczyk female bar MU 23 strict

grading_py_recommended_updates.note: gymnastics.md 데이터 기반 grading.py 갱신 권장값. 배열=[games, elite, rxplus, rx, scaled] lower bound
grading_py_recommended_updates._PULLUP_UB_note: games=30→23 (USMC max가 실증 최고치. 30은 과대추정). 나머지 유지.
grading_py_recommended_updates._CTB_UB_note: 직접 데이터 없음. 현재 추정치 합리적. 유지.
grading_py_recommended_updates._T2B_UB_note: 직접 데이터 없음. 현재 추정치 유지.
grading_py_recommended_updates._HSPU_UB_note: §2-5 kipping 30+가 advanced이므로 elite=25~30 범위. 현재값 합리적. 유지.
grading_py_recommended_updates._RING_MUSCLE_UP_UB_note: BMU 약 80% 수준. 현재값 합리적. 유지.
grading_py_recommended_updates._PUSHUP_UB_note: §2-4: ACFT 100pts=60, 상급=60-80, 중급=40-55. elite=60+이면 rxplus=55, rx=40이 더 정확. scaled=15(군 최소 기준).
grading_py_recommended_updates._PUSHUP_PER_MIN_note: §2-4 ACFT: 상급 60-80(100점=60). games=65~70, elite=55, rxplus=42, rx=30, scaled=18 이 더 정확.
